nits: loader.ts uses console.error for SELECT/UPDATE failures while the surrounding worker code typically routes through ctx.publish or a structured logger; the swallowed-error path will not surface in agent_activity.
Test stub matches SQL by case-insensitive substring on the joined template; brittle if the query string changes, but adequate for now.
markBrowserSiteVerified is exported and unit-tested but has no production call-site yet (deferred to E.3); not a blocker since spec ties it to the E.3 sign-in-wall detector.
extractHost only strips a single leading 'www.' — multi-label subdomains like 'www.www.foo.com' won't be normalized, but spec only requires the linkedin.com/www.linkedin.com case.
